hero.subheadline: The only platform that stays with your family — from the moment you meet your caregiver to your everyday relationship.

how.headline: The hard part isn't finding a caregiver.

step1.label: Smart Matching
step1.headline: Say bye to the overwhelming hiring process.
step1.description: Tell NUOS about your child once. Get the top 3 caregivers most compatible with your family — vetted, ranked, ready to meet.

step2.label: NUOS Partner
step2.headline: Always in the loop.
step2.description: A structured daily record you and your caregiver build together. Tasks, photos, and milestone notes, all organized by day. And if anything feels off, NUOS support is one tap away.

step3.label: Child Development Intelligence
step3.headline: Optimize your child's development with NUOS Tumbuh
step3.description: Co-create your child's milestone log with your caregiver. Our AI, NUOS Tumbuh, will help you define the best actions and activities to achieve your child's next milestones.

why.headline: Because little ones deserve the best care.

card1.headline: Every caregiver is trusted and professional
card1.description: Background checks, health screening, skills test, and training — all done before day one.

card2.headline: Something goes wrong? We've got it.
card2.description: BPJS, on-time salary, a replacement guarantee, and 24/7 support — for as long as your contract runs.

card3.headline: Smart caregiving, built in.
card3.description: Your caregiver always knows what to do next. Activities guided by your child's exact developmental stage.

step1.name: Placement fee
step1.description: Background check, vetting, pre-employment training, and compatibility match guaranteed.

step2.name: Caregiver salary
step2.description: Goes directly to your caregiver via NUOS. Salary depends on experience and skillset.

step3.name: NUOS subscription
step3.feature2: Replacement guarantee for entire employment period
step3.feature3: Smart caregiving & child development intelligence, with our AI, NUOS Tumbuh

items.a: NUOS is an AI-native platform that helps families find, hire, and manage professional caregivers. We don't disappear after placement. We stay with your family through the entire employment period, from the first match to every day your caregiver shows up.
NUOS is currently available in Indonesia only (Greater Jakarta, Bandung, Semarang, Surabaya). Expansion to other countries is coming soon.

You pay a one-time placement fee of Rp 1.500.000 when you hire. Monthly, you'll pay your caregiver's monthly salary (Rp 2.500.000–4.000.000) through NUOS and NUOS subscription fee (Rp 125.000–200.000). This is how we ensure you have 24/7 emergency hotline, replacement guarantee, smart caregiving & child development intelligence, and ongoing caregiver monitoring & training throughout the employment period.

items.q: What does NUOS do during the caregiver's employment?
items.a: We stay active the entire time. Weekly pulse checks for both your family and your caregiver, a 24/7 emergency hotline, monthly performance check-ins, ongoing caregiver training, and child development guidance through our AI, NUOS Tumbuh. If something feels off, we're one tap away.

items.q: What does NUOS Tumbuh AI do?
items.a: NUOS Tumbuh AI assists you in your caregiving journey. Every day, you and your caregiver get guided activities and stimulus recommendations based on your child's exact developmental stage. Every milestone gets logged, measured against WHO benchmarks, and summarized so you can see your child actually growing. It's smart caregiving built in, no more second guessing in parenting.

items.q: What if the caregiver isn't the right fit?
items.a: Every caregiver employment through NUOS includes a free replacement guarantee for the whole employment period. If a caregiver is not working according to their work scope, misbehaves, or acts unprofessionally, tell us. We'll find you a new match at no additional fee.

items.q: Why NUOS and not another agency or platform?
items.a: Other platforms find you a caregiver. We stay to make sure it actually works. We're with you from the first match to every check-in, every milestone, every time something feels off.

waitlist.headline: Your family deserve the best caregiver
waitlist.subheadline: Join the waitlist and we'll reach out the moment NUOS goes live in your city.
waitlist.success: You're on the list. We'll be in touch soon.
waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.tagline: Nurturing, Understanding, Outstanding and Safe Care for families everywhere.

ui.aiSummaryText: Strong cognitive growth this month. Vocabulary is the area to watch — worth noting in your next check-in.
ui.logbookNote: "Lina laughed so much during painting today — see the photo!"
